"[45] RP RECALLING ADVS HE WAS TAKEN OO FWY BY PARAMEDICS FOR WEFARE CHECK DUE TO BEING ASLEEP IN HIS VEH WHEN 3A ARRIVED // WAS NOT TRANSPORTED TO HOSP // VEH WAS TOWED BEFORE HE COULD RTN TO VEH // HE IS NOW TRYING TO GET VEH OO 1185 YARD - THEY WILL NOT RELEASE VEH TO HIM BECAUSE IT IS STILL REGISSTERED TO HIS DECEASED MOTHER WHO PASSED A COUPLE OF MONTHS AGO - RP HAS DEATH CERTIFICATE - TK IS HIS INHERITANCE // 1185 TOLD HIM THEY COULD ONLY RELEASE IT TO HIM W/ WRITTEN PERMISSION FOR CHP"
